title: Smoky Norwegian Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe featuring lamb skewers marinated in a smoky Norwegian-inspired mix of herbs and spices.

ingredients.name: Norwegian-inspired spice mix (fennel seeds, coriander seeds, and a pinch of salt)
ingredients.notes: Mix fennel seeds and coriander seeds

instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, Norwegian-inspired spice mix, garlic, lemon juice, and black pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until coated.
4. Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the grill grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
7. If using, add the intensely smoky Norwegian wood chips to the grill during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
8. Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
9. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
